arts.ttl: Dynamo Kyiv vs Lazio | Europa League Preview | Where to Watch, Form Guide, Insights, Lineups
arts.sum: Following a lukewarm start to their Serie A campaign, Lazio will launch their European campaign with an away contest against Dynamo Kyiv. Similar to the Champions League, EL has adopted a new format that sees all 36 clubs pitted in one group, adding a new twist to the tournament. arts.ttl: Baroni: ‘Europa League a goal for Lazio’ with ‘opportunity’ against Dinamo Kyiv

arts.ttl: Baroni to Ring the Changes in Lazio Lineup for Europa League Clash
arts.sum: Following the weekend defeat in Florence, Lazio coach Marco Baroni will be making some tweaks to the starting lineup for Wednesday’s Europa League contest against Dynamo Kyiv. According to La Lazio Siamo Noi, the coach could change up to eight players from the starting lineup that took on Fiorentina on Sunday. arts.ttl: Boost for Lazio as Attacker Returns Ahead of Europa League Opener
arts.sum: Lazio have received an important boost as their main striker Taty Castellanos has made his return to training just in time to receive a call-up for their Europa League opener. The Argentine enjoyed a stellar start to the new campaign, grabbing three goals in the first four Serie A rounds.
